title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCIII. Lullabies.
content:
Rock well my cradle,
            And "bee baa," my son;
        You shall have a new gown,
            When ye lord comes home.

        Oh! still my child, Orange,
            Still him with a bell;
        I can't still him, ladie,
            Till you come down yoursell!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCIII. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
